---
description: "Use when: editing PLAN.md so phases and steps remain machine-readable, TODO-friendly, and consistent for orchestration helpers."
applyTo: "PLAN.md"
---

# PLAN.md Guidance

- Keep phase headings in the form `## Phase Pn - Title`.
- Keep step lines in the form `- [ ] Pn-Sn: Step title`, `- [-] ...`, or `- [x] ...`.
- Preserve stable step IDs once work starts.
- Include Owner, Depends on, Acceptance, Tests, and Review lines under each step.
- Update completion notes and review summary rather than adding ad hoc status sections elsewhere.
